message:
fix(constraints): enforce NOT NULL constraints at codegen level and fix table_info reporting

The NOT NULL constraint system had two gaps:

1. table_info pragma incorrectly reported IPK columns as NOT NULL even
   when they weren't declared as such — the `notnull` field was ORed
   with `is_ipk`, masking the actual schema declaration. Fixed by
   reporting only the declared `col.notnull` value.

2. NOT NULL constraints were not enforced at the VDBE level during
   INSERT and UPDATE operations. Added `emit_not_null_constraints()`
   which emits `HaltIfNull` opcodes for each non-IPK column declared
   NOT NULL, aborting with SQLITE_CONSTRAINT and a descriptive error
   message. This is called in all INSERT paths (values, select,
   select-without-from) and both UPDATE paths (standard and
   UPDATE...FROM).

Also adds 5 new oracle conformance tests covering:
- DELETE with IN subquery and compound WHERE clauses
- CREATE VIEW and querying views with JOINs
- INSERT OR IGNORE / INSERT OR REPLACE conflict resolution
- Datetime edge cases (julianday, strftime, date arithmetic)
- Type affinity comparison semantics across TEXT/INTEGER/REAL

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
